impact_boundary: Database layer only — 13 model files defining 50+ tables, 35+ migrations, 11 repository modules. No code changes required; this is a read-only architectural survey.
risks: Two alembic heads (9ab21154bc81 and x9y8z7w6v5u4) — cannot cleanly upgrade without merge
FK type mismatches: BigInteger vs Integer on User.id references (ConversationSummary, ScheduledMessage, ContactProfile.contact_id, PendingQuestion.owner_id)
Missing explicit FK on Memory.related_memory_id → Memory.id (uses BigInteger without FK constraint)
FTS5 virtual tables excluded from Alembic autogenerate — manual sync risk on schema changes
memory_repo.py is 1875 lines (god object) — hard to maintain/test
No connection pool tuning for production workloads

suggested_agents.reason: Fix alembic merge (create merge migration), add missing FKs, align BigInteger→Integer type mismatches across 4+ models
Split memory_repo.py into domain modules (queries, graph, fts) for maintainability
Add alembic autogenerate test in CI to catch model/migration drift; test FTS5 trigger sync on bulk ops
